comment: The Night Mail rules metadata (plan §5e: the SVG carries shape, this file carries scoring/mode rules). Consumed by src/game/Scoring.ts and src/game/nightmail.ts. Design truth: design/tables/nightmail/BRIEF.md.

expressCombo.comment: The Express Run (full Main Line orbit): repeat loops inside the window escalate ×2 per step.

exchange.comment: The mail hook: spinner spins arm the magnet; a snag pays snagPoints × the Express step and spots a Sorting Office rung.

branch.comment: A ball tipped through the Points onto the exchange lane.

incline.comment: The banking engine couples on and shoves the ball to the summit.

sorting.comment: Sorting Office scoop: each capture awards the next item in the mailbag (wrapping); the STRONGBOX spots a timetable station and lights SIGNAL BOX; every capture lights the Loop Line.

timetable.comment: Completing M-A-I-L advances one station; the bonus multiplier tracks the station (capped) and each completion lights the BANKER kickback. Letters lane-change on the flippers and persist across balls.

signalBox.comment: DMD video mode (M12): lit by the STRONGBOX; the scoop holds the ball while the flippers pull junction levers ahead of the little train. All junctions cleared couples a wagon.

departure.comment: Coupling + DEPARTURE: a signal-gantry bank completion lights LOCK; a lit siding arrival couples a wagon. wagonsRequired coupled starts DEPARTURE — durationS of ×scoreFactor scoring with jackpots on the Express and the branch, the Points auto-toggling on every jackpot, the turntable spinning. (Single-ball frenzy until engine multiball lands — the brief's documented cut line.)

connection.comment: Wizard mode: reach TERMINUS, start one DEPARTURE and make one Exchange snag; the Sorting Office then lights for THE CONNECTION.
